mnemonics: JAVA JDK, ANDROID SDK, AND STUDIO D - The three key downloads for Android Dev.
keyPoints: Install the Java Development Kit (JDK) for the core programming language.
Install Android Studio, the official IDE which bundles the Android SDK.
Use the SDK Manager inside Android Studio to install specific platform versions and tools.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to enable 'Virtualization' in the BIOS for the Android Emulator to run.
Not installing the correct Android SDK platform versions for your target devices.
Skipping the installation of 'Android Emulator Hypervisor Driver for AMD Processors' (if on AMD CPU).
